conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "apologize" in the email.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once. Avoid using the keyword "apologize" in the email.
response:
Subject: Urgent Request: Extension for [Project Name] – [Your Full Name]

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I am writing to respectfully request a short extension for the [Project Name], which is currently due in two days. Due to an unexpected personal emergency that has arisen this week, I am unable to complete the final stages of my work by the original deadline.

I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. I am confident that I can submit a high-quality draft by [New Proposed Date], and I am happy to provide any additional documentation regarding the situation if required.

Thank you for your time and understanding.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]  
[Your Student ID]  
[Course Name/Number]
